title: viola × adulterina var. intricata
intro: Viola × adulterina var. intricata is a rare and unique hybrid plant, resulting from the cross between Viola tricolor and Viola calcarata. It is a flowering plant species known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as anxiety, insomnia, and skin conditions. The plant's leaves and flowers contain flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, contributing to its health benefits. Viola × adulterina var. intricata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and therapeutic effects.
